collection.name: Azusa, Lost but Seeking
collection.description: You may play two additional lands on each of your turns.
collection.flavor_text: "With every step, I discover a new stage. With every breath, a new song."

collection.name: Invasion of Muraganda // Primordial Plasm
collection.description: (As a Siege enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You and others can attack it. When it's defeated, exile it, then cast it transformed.), When this Siege enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Then that creature fights up to one target creature you don't control. // At the beginning of combat on your turn, another target creature gets +2/+2 and loses all abilities until end of turn.

collection.name: Appa, the Vigilant
collection.description: Flying, vigilance, Whenever Appa or another Ally you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying and vigilance until end of turn.

collection.name: Brass Herald
collection.description: As this creature enters, choose a creature type. When this creature enters, reveal the top four cards of your library. Put all creature cards of the chosen type revealed this way into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Creatures of the chosen type get +1/+1.

collection.name: Donal, Herald of Wings
collection.description: Whenever you cast a nonlegendary creature spell with flying, you may copy it, except the copy is a 1/1 Spirit in addition to its other types. Do this only once each turn. (The copy becomes a token.)
collection.flavor_text: He sees a flicker of Avacyn's grace in every wingbeat.

collection.name: Faldorn, Dread Wolf Herald
collection.set: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
collection.description: Whenever you cast a spell from exile or a land you control enters from exile, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.
collection.flavor_text: "Cities are a blight on the beauty of nature."

collection.name: A-Mischievous Catgeist // A-Catlike Curiosity
collection.description: Whenever Mischievous Catgeist deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Disturb {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its disturb cost.), // Enchant creature, Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. Enchanted creature has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.", If Catlike Curiosity would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

collection.name: Blink Dog
collection.description: Double strike, Teleport — {3}{W}: This creature phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until your next turn.)
collection.flavor_text: Blink dogs protect the wild places of the world, driving away evil influences.

collection.name: Ancestral Hot Dog Minotaur
collection.description: {TK}{TK} — Afflict 2 (Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 2 life.), {TK}{TK}{TK} — Flying, {TK}{TK} — 1/4, {TK}{TK}{TK}{TK}{TK} — 8/6

collection.name: A-Lantern Bearer // A-Lanterns' Lift
collection.description: Flying, Disturb {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its disturb cost.), // Enchant creature, Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. If Lanterns' Lift would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

card.name: Fire Lord Azula
card.description: Firebending 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{R}. This mana lasts until end of combat.), Whenever you cast a spell while Fire Lord Azula is attacking, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)
card.flavor_text: "I'm sorry it has to end this way, brother."

card.name: Primordial Hydra
card.description: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, double the number of +1/+1 counters on this creature. This creature has trample as long as it has ten or more +1/+1 counters on it.
